zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Croftes於大約1520年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆時，他的父親Sir John Croftes30歲，母親Rosa Sampson28歲。他於1536年與Lady Elizabeth Kitson在英國素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1558年2月14日享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Croftes于大约1520年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆时，他的父亲Sir John Croftes30岁，母亲Rosa Sampson28岁。他于1536年与Lady Elizabeth Kitson在英国素福爾可蕾托 薩可哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1558年2月14日享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: Croftes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Croft , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croft
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places, for example in Lincolnshire, Lancashire, Herefordshire, and North Yorkshire, all named with Old English croft ‘small arable enclosure (normally adjoining a house)’, or a topographic name for someone who lived by a croft, from Middle English croft.
English: possibly in some cases a variant of   Craft   2.
Americanized form of German, Danish, Swedish, or Jewish   Kraft  . Compare   Kroft   and   Craft  .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Croftes was born about 1520, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Croftes, was 30 and his mother, Rosa Sampson, was 28. He married Lady Elizabeth Kitson in 1536, in Little Saxham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 14 February 1558, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Croftes est né environ 1520, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Croftes, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Rosa Sampson, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Kitson en 1536, à Little Saxham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 14 février 1558, à l’âge de 39 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Croftes è nato il circa 1520 nel Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Croftes, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Rosa Sampson, aveva 28 anni. ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Croftesが約1520年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Croftesは30歳，母Rosa Sampsonは28歳であった。1536年にイギリススフォルクリットル サクスハムでLady Elizabeth Kitsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1558年2月14日に39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Croftes(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Croftes(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosa Sampson(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1536년 영국 수폴크 리틀 사스함에서 Lady Elizabeth Kitson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1558년 2월 14일 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Croftes nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Little Saxham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Croftes, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Rosa Sampson, tinha 28 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Croftes родился около 1520 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Croftes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosa Sampson, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Kitson в 1536 г. в местности литл саксхам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 14 февраля 1558 г. в возрасте 39 лет.
